pi_items.source: task.json description and verifier.py VLM prompt explicitly require scheduling the 'Successful Logon' report.
task.json description and verifier.py VLM prompt explicitly require the report to run 'Weekly' or 'every week'.
task.json description and verifier.py VLM prompt explicitly require the report to run on 'Monday'.
task.json description explicitly requires finding the report under the 'Logon Reports' category.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a dynamically installed instance of ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer. The expected parameters explicitly required by the prompt instructions and the verifier.py VLM logic are the 'Successful Logon' report, located under 'Logon Reports', scheduled 'Weekly' on 'Monday'.
